mapper.insert: insert into clazz(name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, create_time, update_time,subject) values(#{name}, #{room}, #{beginDate}, #{endDate}, #{masterId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},#{subject})
mapper.select:
select c.id, c.name, c.room, c.begin_date, c.end_date, c.master_id, c.create_time, c.update_time, e.name as master_name, CASE WHEN CURDATE() >= c.end_date THEN '未开班' WHEN curdate() < c.end_date THEN '已开班' ELSE '在读中' END status from clazz c left join emp e on c.master_id = e.id
and c.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
SELECT c.name AS clazz, COUNT(s.id) AS data FROM clazz c LEFT JOIN student s ON c.id = s.clazz_id GROUP BY c.id, c.name
